{{CargoOrgan
|name=Super Nerve Fiber
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10851
|idx=56
|description=This is a section of nerve endings from a patient with severe mental illness. Because the patient's nerves are unusually sensitive, they were able to perceive the world from a higher dimension!
|skill=
|hp=1526
|def=179
|atk=151
|rush=148
|gene1=Per purple or higher organ implanted, {race} RUSH +2
Purple or higher Organs implanted: 40/40
|gene2=RUSH Ignore DEF +2%
|gene3=RUSH CRIT DMG +5%
|gene4=If you spot a weakness, DMG +3%
|gene7=If you spot a weakness, DMG +3% (Awakened)
|}}
